summary: Completed testing of Smart Scanner Excel upload, Import confirmation (Body import fix), Upload History module, and Location permission on app startup. All backend APIs pass (8/8 tests). All frontend features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Smart Scanner Excel/CSV upload - /api/smart-scanner/excel returns 200, parses items correctly
Smart Scanner Import with JSON body - /api/smart-scanner/import accepts Body parameter (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
Upload History list - /api/upload-history returns upload records
Upload History delete - /api/upload-history/{id} DELETE works correctly
Import validation - Empty items returns 400 as expected
Imported items persist in database - verified via /api/items search
CSV with alternative column names (item_name, product_code) mapped correctly
CSV with empty SKU auto-generates SKU
Location permission toast shown on app startup
Upload History page loads with stats cards (Total Uploads, Successful, Partial, Failed)
Upload History table displays records with View/Download/Delete actions
Smart Scanner page accessible via Items > Add Item > Open Scanner
Smart Scanner Excel/CSV Upload tab with Download Template button
Smart Scanner Invoice Scanner tab with AI document type options
Smart Scanner Camera Scan tab with barcode format support
critical_code_review_comments: Body import from FastAPI is correctly added on line 1 of server.py - bug fix verified
Smart Scanner import endpoint properly accepts JSON body with items and store_id
Upload History records are created automatically when imports complete
Location permission request triggers on app startup via LocationSecurityContext useEffect
seed_data_creation: Created test items via Smart Scanner import: TEST_Import_Product_1, TEST_Import_Product_2, TEST_Verify_Product
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: 1) Smart Scanner Excel upload works via /api/smart-scanner/excel, 2) Import confirmation with JSON body works via /api/smart-scanner/import (Body import fix verified), 3) Upload History page shows import records at /upload-history, 4) Location permission toast appears on app startup. Smart Scanner is accessed via Items page > Add Item button > Open Scanner option.

smart_scanner_excel_upload.notes: Accepts FormData with file, parses CSV/Excel, returns items array

smart_scanner_import.notes: Body import added to FastAPI, accepts JSON with items and store_id

upload_history.ui_page: Upload History in sidebar, shows stats cards and table with actions

location_permission.notes: Toast 'Please allow location access for store security features' shown on app startup
